name: Jana Halfarova
quote: As a designer, when I first heard about the NN1 Dev Club, I wasn’t particularly interested because I wrongly assumed, based on the name, that it was only for developers and engineers. I quickly realised the community is open to anyone with a passion for tech, regardless of their role or background. Huge shout-out to Paweł and Darren for organising these meetups and creating a space where people from across the tech community can connect!
